rules_evaluated.fix_hint: Plan-mode activation, push-back mechanism, and auto-load filename surfaces all match compendium-verified facts (re-verified 2026-05-14).

rules_evaluated.rule_lead: Known correct Claude Code facts: Plan mode = Shift+Tab cycle OR /plan.
rules_evaluated.fix_hint: Maintainer line 146 names 'Shift+Tab cycle (CLI) or the mode dropdown (Desktop)'. Matches compendium §6 wording exactly; no Shift+P misclaim.

Plug points + artefact contracts state the auto-load semantics correctly: ./CLAUDE.local.md + ~/.claude/CLAUDE.md auto-load; ~/.claude/memory/<file>.md only loads via @import or named-path. Matches §6d verbatim.

rules_evaluated.rule_lead: Sessions are the unit of work.
rules_evaluated.fix_hint: Prework uses 'Open a new Claude Code session in the repo you used for Module 1' — sessions-as-unit phrasing.

rules_evaluated.rule_lead: Practitioner writing on employer's venue: label [practitioner direct, vendor venue].
rules_evaluated.fix_hint: Maintainer line 147 labels Klaassen on every.to as [practitioner direct, vendor venue] per the 2026-05-14 carve-out. Correct.

rules_evaluated.rule_lead: Anthropic product docs labeled as reference, not evidence.
rules_evaluated.fix_hint: Maintainer line 146 labels code.claude.com/docs as [practitioner direct] — functions as a capability reference, not a research evidence claim. Acceptable in context; not student-facing.

rules_evaluated.rule_lead: Cite within 6 months OR explicitly framed historical.
rules_evaluated.fix_hint: Willison piece (June 2025) explicitly framed as 'foundational framing... used as reference not as fresh evidence' — meets historical-context carve-out.
No round-number AI failure stats in file.
Single prompt ae101-m2-integrate-branch carries no bracketed placeholders; references 'this session' and named paths only.
Lead-in: 'Ask Claude to integrate the one branch that earned itself into your personal ./CLAUDE.local.md, or to say so and stop if nothing did.'

rules_evaluated.rule_lead: Canonical presentation shape — lead-in, label with destination chip.
rules_evaluated.fix_hint: Expanded prompt has '**Prompt** *(Claude Code, only if something earned itself)*' destination chip; matches §3 + §28 renderer match exactly.

rules_evaluated.rule_lead: Skills invoke by name, never by path.

rules_evaluated.fix_hint: Single short prompt with no plan-mode invocation and no 4+ named sub-steps — preamble-suppressor not required.

rules_evaluated.rule_lead: Don't restate session CWD inside the prompt body.
rules_evaluated.fix_hint: Prompt uses ./CLAUDE.local.md as relative subpath — no absolute paths, no cd commands.
Body uses {{prompt:ae101-m2-integrate-branch}} marker; expander resolves to canonical fenced shape.

platform_claims_checked.claim: Push-back via 'keep planning with feedback' at the approval prompt
Ctrl+G plan-file edit flow named as a practitioner primitive

citations_checked.claim: Boris Cherny, Mastering Claude Code in 30 minutes (YouTube)
Simon Willison, The lethal trifecta for AI agents (June 2025)
Plan mode reference — Anthropic Claude Code docs
What would have to be true — Roger Martin (HBR, Playing to Win)
